hooks.command: FILE_PATH=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); PROTECTED='.env .env.local .env.production credentials secrets .pem .key'; for p in $PROTECTED; do case "$FILE_PATH" in *"$p"*) echo "BLOCKED: $FILE_PATH is a protected file. Do not edit secrets/credentials directly." >&2; exit 2;; esac; done; exit 0

CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); case "$CMD" in *'push'*'--force'*|*'push'*'-f'*) echo 'BLOCKED: Force push detected. Use regular push or ask the user first.' >&2; exit 2;; *'reset --hard'*) echo 'BLOCKED: git reset --hard is destructive. Confirm with user first.' >&2; exit 2;; *'rm -rf'*) echo 'BLOCKED: rm -rf is destructive. Confirm with user first.' >&2; exit 2;; *'drop table'*|*'DROP TABLE'*) echo 'BLOCKED: DROP TABLE detected. Confirm with user first.' >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0
